name: FRONT GATE START HERE
purpose: Orient, classify, route, prove, and close the node-specific part of the whole-home navigation system.
what_it_welcomes: Objects matching this node role with source/home/proof metadata.
what_it_refuses: Private-to-public leaks, CURRENT writes by assistant/mule, proofless PASS, stale chat-loaded truth, and unhomed debris.
allowed_inputs: Files, folders, packages, receipts, hashes, summaries, public-safe pointers, and candidate decisions.
allowed_outputs: Receipts, route decisions, public-safe summaries, custody moves, issue-review entries, verification states.
allowed_moves: Only moves permitted by authority, privacy, and precondition fields.
blocked_moves: CURRENT write/promotion by assistant/mule; private prompt publication; evidence deletion; guessed local truth.
neighbor_nodes: Legal neighbors are declared in METATRON_EDGE_REGISTRY.
proof_required: Path plus classification plus SHA256 for files plus receipt or ledger pointer plus close condition.
authority_boundary: Public URL is orientation only; custody/tools are mule-local.
return_home_state: CURRENT, READY_WAITING_USER, CUSTODY, RECEIPTS, TOOLS, FAILED_TOOLS, ISSUE_REVIEW, PUBLIC_SAFE_POINTER, LOCAL_ONLY_PRIVATE, ARCHIVED, or BLOCKED.
close_condition: Node has no unclassified active objects and all outgoing edges are closed or blocked with reason.
final_judge: PASS only through FINAL_JUDGE after all required bits close; otherwise REVIEW, BLOCKED, or FAIL.

what_it_refuses: Private-to-public leaks, CURRENT writes by assistant/mule, proofless PASS, stale chat-loaded truth, and unhomed debris.
allowed_inputs: Files, folders, packages, receipts, hashes, summaries, public-safe pointers, and candidate decisions.
allowed_outputs: Receipts, route decisions, public-safe summaries, custody moves, issue-review entries, verification states.
allowed_moves: Only moves permitted by authority, privacy, and precondition fields.
blocked_moves: CURRENT write/promotion by assistant/mule; private prompt publication; evidence deletion; guessed local truth.
neighbor_nodes: Legal neighbors are declared in METATRON_EDGE_REGISTRY.
proof_required: Path plus classification plus SHA256 for files plus receipt or ledger pointer plus close condition.
authority_boundary: Public URL is orientation only; custody/tools are mule-local.
return_home_state: CURRENT, READY_WAITING_USER, CUSTODY, RECEIPTS, TOOLS, FAILED_TOOLS, ISSUE_REVIEW, PUBLIC_SAFE_POINTER, LOCAL_ONLY_PRIVATE, ARCHIVED, or BLOCKED.
close_condition: Node has no unclassified active objects and all outgoing edges are closed or blocked with reason.
final_judge: PASS only through FINAL_JUDGE after all required bits close; otherwise REVIEW, BLOCKED, or FAIL.
